claims.summary: Legacy 32-slot spectral fingerprints and additive 12D glimpses serve different contracts from the 48D semantic lane.
claims.disposition: Verify typed reconstruction, legacy compatibility, exact finite 12D validation, and companion-only semantics.

claims.summary: Malformed or non-finite hybrid and glimpse inputs must not become coherence or validated compact evidence.
claims.disposition: Verify 31-slot, NaN/infinity hybrid, and 11D/13D/non-finite glimpse regressions.

claims.summary: The broad 0.50-to-0.90 mixed-transition label retains its numeric value and is separate from pairwise-overlap collision evidence.
claims.disposition: Verify numeric coherence, maximum delta, overlap threshold, and independent issue states.

claims.summary: Changing mixed thresholds, width contracts, or telemetry fields would alter a live-consumed compatibility or report surface.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait before ABI or rendering changes.
